description.ko: 햇빛이 닿지 않는 바다 가장 깊은 곳을 탐험하며, 생물 발광 생명체들이 지배하는 세계를 조사하는 최첨단 심해 탐사선입니다.
description.en: A high-tech underwater vessel venturing into the deepest parts of the ocean, where sunlight never reaches and bioluminescent life reigns supreme.

prompt: Cinematic shot of the AQUA-5 advanced submersible navigating the dark midnight zone of the deep ocean, vibrant bioluminescent coral and alien-like fish, glowing neon blue hull lights, hyper-realistic water effects, deep sea trench background, 8k resolution, futuristic technology.
